questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Connection Timeouts?
options: Inefficient scaling of Round-Trip Time (RTT) estimations equations, and exponential backoff timeouts calculations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Round-Trip Time (RTT) estimations equations, and exponential backoff timeouts calculations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Round-Trip Time (RTT) estimations equations, and exponential backoff timeouts calculations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
